narrative:
Precinct Geneva 2 (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 840 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points.
